name: Liver in Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Season liver with salt and pepper.
2. Heat margarine in a pan over medium to high heat. Remove the liver and keep it warm.
3. When the oil has melted, pour off some of the remaining oil.
4. In the remaining oil, saute shallots until they are clear or tender.
5. Add white wine and bring to a boil.
6. Stir in mustard and blend into the mixture.
7. Simmer for a few minutes.
8. Place liver on a platter and pour the sauce over it.
